case_title: SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN VS. JIAN XIONG CHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,892.25 (BY FAX) FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XIONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00);FORM STAMPED:"BY FAX". SERVED MAR-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XIONG
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSEN. FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XIONG $1,892.25 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,067.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
